name: SSRF via fetch/got/node-fetch
description: User-controlled input flows into fetch(), got, or node-fetch HTTP calls without URL validation. An attacker can force the server to make requests to internal services, cloud metadata endpoints, or other restricted resources.
remediation: Validate and sanitize URLs before making HTTP requests. Use an allowlist of permitted hostnames or IP ranges. Block requests to private IP ranges (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, 169.254.169.254). Use a URL parser to verify the scheme and host before the request.
